design_philosophy.core_loop: Select play from playbook → Execute offensive/defensive formation → Resolve outcome based on player attributes and real NFL team rosters → Progress through season tracking statistics
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real NFL team matchups with authentic player attributes create strategic depth through roster composition and play selection
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Coach and play as authentic NFL teams and legendary players (Bo Jackson, Randall Cunningham) during realistic season play
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: First game to combine both NFL and NFLPA licenses simultaneously, prioritizing authenticity of real teams and players over fictional alternatives. Opinionated about statistical accuracy and seasonal progression rather than arcade simplification

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: SNES version added in-game option to adjust AI difficulty in regular season games; player skill scales with authentic NFL player attributes creating variable difficulty through roster construction

progression.upgrade_system: Season mode tracks statistical achievements during games; SNES/Genesis versions track multi-season progression (1991-1993 playable consecutively)
progression.unlock_mechanism: Pro Bowl games available as separate exhibition mode; PlayStation version added play-by-play announcer and alternate camera angles as progression rewards
replayability_hooks: Multiple authentic NFL teams with different rosters and playstyles
User-controlled team customization (PlayStation version with unlimited trades and attribute editing)

world_building_techniques: Authentic NFL team logos and names establish real-world sports context
Statistical tracking and seasonal progression create authentic sports narrative framework
Player attribute differentiation reflects actual NFL player capabilities

faction_indicators: All 28 official NFL teams with distinct rosters create team allegiance mechanics
Real player names and attributes enable player-specific fan loyalty
environmental_storytelling: Official NFL team logos in end zones (added SNES/Genesis versions)
Three weather conditions (sunny, rain, snow) create atmospheric variety
Authentic stadium and team presentation reinforces real-world football authenticity
